title: AppSec Core Ontology Research: Curated Research Program Release v1.0.3
description:
Curated research program release v1.0.3 for the AppSec Core Ontology Research line. This release includes three related papers and release-grade artifacts covering application security ontology design, coverage-preserving knowledge compilation, and ontology-grounded retrieval for LLM-assisted security workflows.

Homepage: https://www.securitybydesign.dev
Published manual: https://www.securitybydesign.dev/sbd-toe/sbd-manual/

creators.name: Farinha, Pedro
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher / Shiftleft - Secure Software Engineering, Lda.
